data.title: Former OpenAI CTO Mira Murati Targets Record-Breaking $2 Billion Seed Round For New AI Startup
data.description: Mira Murati is reportedly seeking a record-breaking $2 billion seed round for her new AI startup, Thinking Machines.

data.title: Europe, China Eye EV Price Pact To Avert Trump Tariff Escalation After Tesla CEO Elon Musk Pushes For Zero EU Tariffs Amid Declining Sales
data.description: The European Union and China have agreed to explore setting minimum prices for Chinese-made electric vehicles.

data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Lower As Volatility Persists Before Bank Earnings: 'Fed Is Likely To Cut Rates Again On June 18th,' Says Expert
data.description: U.S. stock futures were volatile on Friday after losing steam on Thursday. Futures of major benchmark indices were lower in premarket.

data.title: Trump's 25% Tariffs Could Cost Auto Companies $108 Billion: Report
data.description: Trump halts most tariffs for 90 days, but the auto sector still faces a 25% tariff. Report shows it could cost $108 Billion to the industry.
